query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A soft-focus close-up of a pale flower with five white petals radiating from a small red center, surrounded by delicate yellow and orange stamens, rendered in pale pink, cream, and warm amber tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, abstract double-exposure close-up of a pale flower where the five white petals radiate from a small red center in a radial motion blur, with delicate stamens dissolving into streaks of amber and yellow, all rendered in washed-out, desaturated pink and cream tones that leave surfaces smeared and indistinct.
